title: Create a Proton Account | Take back your privacy
text:
Already have an account? Sign in
Set your password

Get a secure Proton Mail address, or use your current email.

Password

Strong

Get started
End-to-end encrypted
By continuing, you agree to our terms and conditions and privacy policy.
Every free account comes with:
Mail
Calendar
VPN
Drive
Pass
Lumo
Encrypted email with 1 GB storage
1 address, 3 calendars
2000+ VPN servers in 10 countries
5 GB cloud storage for files and photos
Collaborative documents and spreadsheets
Password manager for all your devices
Private AI assistant with encrypted chat history
Privacy policy
Terms
Need help?
